description_long: This is a standard claw hammer featuring a robust, metallic head and a long, ergonomically contoured handle. The handle is coated in a red, textured material, likely rubber or a similar synthetic, providing a secure and comfortable grip. The head is made of steel, with one side forming a flat, circular striking face and the other side splitting into a curved claw for nail removal. The shaft connecting the head to the handle appears to be metallic, adding strength and durability. The hammer shows a practical, utilitarian design suitable for construction, carpentry, or general repair tasks in urban environments. No visible branding, wear, or additional attachments are present.
description: A red-handled claw hammer with a steel head, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal. The handle is textured for grip and comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded end of the red handle and the head with both the striking face and claw visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the red handle, the metallic shaft, and the distinct shape of the hammer head with its claw.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the handle's grip and the open, curved claw of the hammer head.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the handle, shaft, and the hammer head's striking face and claw from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: Rubberized ergonomic grip, straight with a slight contour, textured for enhanced grip and comfort.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head made of steel, featuring a flat striking face on one side and a curved, split claw on the other for nail removal.
